name: Customer Journey Analytics: A Complete Guide
snippet:
Mar 21, 2022 — Customer Journey Analytics is the process of understanding the impact of every interaction a customer has with your business.
Customer journey analytics can help you to nail down exactly why your customers behave the way they do and tie your customer experience efforts to financial outcomes. Learn how to use customer journey analytics for improved CX with our ultimate guide.
